incident_summary: Coating pan FP-522 experienced nozzle blockage during batch A1244C film coating. Spray rate dropped causing uneven coat weight — 11.2% of tablets outside ±3.3% uniformity limit.
root_cause_detail: Nozzle orifice blocked by dried coating solution due to inadequate purging at end of previous run.
corrective_action: Coating halted. Nozzle removed, ultrasonically cleaned, and flow rate verified. Batch quarantined and reworked after QA approval. Equipment HP-549 re-validated before return to service.
preventive_action: Nozzle purge step added to start-up and end-of-run checklist. Nozzle inspection added to weekly PM schedule. Coating solution viscosity specification tightened with incoming test mandatory.
effectiveness_check: Zero coating OOS events over next 10 batches on this equipment. Nozzle PM compliance ≥ 100% for 3 months.
